title: @mentions not rendered: Mastodon requires tag array and pre-linked HTML
description: Plain text @user@domain in content is not rendered as a mention in Mastodon. Mastodon requires: 1) mention linked in HTML as @user, 2) a 'tag' array on the Note with {type: Mention, href, name}. Need to detect @user@domain patterns and resolve them.
close_reason: Hashtags and mentions now render correctly in Mastodon — verified live against mastodon.social
